selection_rationale: Cloudflare hosts BGE-M3 behind a managed Workers AI endpoint.
The model supports multilingual dense retrieval and returns 1024-dimensional vectors.
The provider aligns with the existing R2 and Workers architecture.
Qdrant provides a dedicated vector index while R2 and Markdown remain canonical.
The local E5 benchmark did not justify replacing lexical retrieval.
Local BGE-M3 and GTE downloads were operationally unreliable on the target network.
required_follow_up: run the frozen 16-query benchmark through the real Cloudflare endpoint
create a non-production Qdrant collection using cosine distance and dimension 1024
verify M20 semantic artifacts and exact vector hashes
retain lexical rollback and do not enable production retrieval
